2604.17557.title: Causal-Temporal Event Graphs: A Formal Model for Recursive Agent Execution Traces
2604.17557.paper_summary: We introduce causal-temporal event graphs (CTEGs) as a formal model for fully resolved recursive agent execution records under single-parenthood causal semantics. We formalise direct event emissions and recursive subagent invocations as extension procedures on generic typed temporal graphs and show that the recursive closure $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ of the induced maximal dynamics starting from single causal roots consists entirely of finite sequences of CTEGs. A CTEG is a rooted arborescence whose nodes carry timestamps and event types, subject to the constraint that timestamps be strictly increasing along causal paths. We realise $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ as the increasing union of a recursive hierarchy $\mathscr{E}_0 \subseteq \mathscr{E}_1 \subseteq \cdots$ of agent execution levels parametrised by recursion depth, which is recognised as the ascending Kleene chain of a monotone operator $\varphi$ admitting $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ as its least fixed point. Although the introduction of the full hierarchy is natural, stabilisation occurs already at $\mathscr{E}_1$ if one insists that the internal construction of a subagent execution trace be a delegated and opaque computational unit. The CTEG formalism supports compositional construction of globally well-formed execution traces from local agent behaviour without centralised coordination, preserves well-formedness under partial execution failure, and admits a natural relational database encoding. The arborescent structure of CTEGs is further compatible with cryptographic Merkle tree commitments for tamper-evident session verification.
2604.17557.paper_summary_zh: 我們引入因果時間事件圖（CTEGs）作為在單親因果語義下完全解析的遞歸代理執行記錄的正式模型。<lb/>我們將直接事件發射和遞歸子代理調用形式化為在通用類型時間圖上的擴展程序，並顯示從單一因果根開始的誘導最大動力學的遞歸閉包 $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ 完全由有限序列的CTEGs組成。<lb/>CTEG是一種根樹，其節點攜帶時間戳和事件類型，受限於時間戳在因果路徑上必須嚴格遞增的約束。<lb/>我們將 $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ 實現為一個遞歸層級 $\mathscr{E}_0 \subseteq \mathscr{E}_1 \subseteq \cdots$ 的遞增聯集，該層級由遞歸深度參數化，這被認為是承認 $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ 為其最小不動點的單調運算符 $\varphi$ 的上升克里尼鏈。<lb/>儘管引入完整的層級是自然的，但如果堅持子代理執行痕跡的內部構造是一個委託的且不透明的計算單元，則穩定化已經在 $\mathscr{E}_1$ 發生。<lb/>CTEG形式主義支持從本地代理行為組成全球良構的執行痕跡，而無需集中協調，並在部分執行失敗的情況下保持良構性，還承認自然的關係數據庫編碼。<lb/>CTEG的樹狀結構進一步與加密Merkle樹承諾相容，以實現可篡改證明的會話驗證。
2604.17557.author: Simon Foldvik et.al.
